codeReview.summary: Implementation covers all VAL-SCH assertions (011-026). Override precedence, partial inheritance, date/timezone validation, slot generation boundaries, buffer handling, idempotency, and contradiction detection are all correctly implemented. No blocking issues found.

issues.description: Booking capacity tracking fetches ALL active bookings system-wide and filters in memory. Could be optimized by filtering at DB level with slotId IN (...) clause. Functional correctness is not affected.

PATCH /overrides uniqueness check uses fetch-then-check approach (conflict.id !== id) instead of using 'ne' in the query like PATCH /templates does. Both approaches work correctly but are inconsistent. The PATCH templates correctly uses 'ne' after the working directory fix.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-domain-worker skill procedure specifies 'Manually verify API behavior with curl' but the worker's verification only tested GET /api/admin/schedule/templates for auth coverage. The slots endpoint (GET /api/admin/schedule/slots?date=...) was not explicitly curl-verified. Auth guard coverage is inferred from mount structure (/api/admin/*) but not confirmed for the specific slots endpoint.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification section shows only: curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/admin/schedule/templates (without auth). Transcript skeleton shows no explicit test of /slots endpoint.

summary: Implementation passes review. All 16 validation contract assertions (VAL-SCH-011 through VAL-SCH-026) are correctly implemented: override > base precedence, total/partial closure, slot boundaries (inclusive start/exclusive end), buffer handling, date validation (including leap year), timezone stability, partial inheritance, contradiction detection, and overlapping window rejection. Auth guards are applied via /api/admin/* middleware mount. Working directory contains fixes for initial commit bugs (ne import, isValidDateFormat leap year). No blocking issues identified.
